title: Blades: Unbound
description: Twin weapons for only the fastest of pvp-ers
body:
I feel like Im held back by minecraft's speed limitations, and I'm sure others feel this way too.

This mod is made to fix that.
within this mod there are two weapons, 
the dreadblade, and the vibroblade.
Each have similar crafting recipes, (be sure to have netherite in your possesion.)
Better combat is required to use these weapons of devastating speed.
Complete with custom sounds and ridiculous size.
Both of these weapons have a custom property that manipulates knockback, allowing you to throw your targets away with the vibriblade, and draw them closer with the breadblade.
Enjoy your new weapons!

Plans: I will eventualy port this to fabric, and I may add some unusual armour to go with the weapons.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
